title: Deploy to Production
description: Full production deployment procedure with canary rollout.
steps: Verify staging is green: all tests pass, no alerts
Create release tag: git tag v{version}
Build and push production Docker images to ECR
Deploy canary (10% traffic): kubectl set image with canary label
Monitor canary for 10 minutes: error rate, latency, logs
If canary healthy: promote to 50%, wait 5 min, then 100%
If canary unhealthy: rollback immediately: kubectl rollout undo
